title: Constructing arguments of system commands from user input is security-sensitive
description: Constructing arguments of system commands from user input is security-sensitiveAnalyze your codeintentionality-logicalsecuritySecurity HotspotcweConstructing arguments of system commands from user input is security-sensitive. It has led in the past to the following vulnerabilities:CVE-2016-9920CVE-2021-29472Arguments of system commands are processed by the executed program. The arguments are usually used to configure and influence the behavior of the programs.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.
